popularStory.headline: First born
popularStory.description: This William Gascoigne has a V after his name. However, he is the 13th firstborn William Gascoigne in a row going back to Sir William Gascoigne born circa 1030 AD. William V should be William XIII and …

zh.Leconfield, Yorkshire, England: 英國越可爾萊康費爾德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William Gascoigne V於大約1450年出生在英國越可爾加福索普時，他的父親Sir William Gascoigne IV26歲，母親Jane Neville18歲。他於大約1467年與Margaret Percy在英國越可爾萊康費爾德結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和7個女兒的父母。他於1485年登記服兵役。他在英國英格蘭越可爾 韋斯特 利丁被列為justice of the peace。他去世於1487年3月12日在英國越可爾希亞活享年38歲，埋葬在英國越可爾希亞活。

zh-hans.Leconfield, Yorkshire, England: 英国越可爾萊康費爾德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir William Gascoigne V于大约1450年出生在英国越可爾加福索普时，他的父亲Sir William Gascoigne IV26岁，母亲Jane Neville18岁。他于大约1467年与Margaret Percy在英国越可爾萊康費爾德结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和7个女儿的父母。他于1485年登记服兵役。他在英国英格兰越可爾 韋斯特 利丁被列为justice of the peace。他去世于1487年3月12日在英国越可爾希亞活享年38岁，埋葬在英国越可爾希亞活。

nameMeanings.name: Gascoigne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (northern): habitational name from Anglo-Norman French Gascon, Middle English Gascoun, Gascon ‘Gascon, native of Gascony’ or the adjective Gascuinz ‘of Gascony’. The name of the region derives from that of the Basques, who are found close by and formerly extended into this region as well; they are first named in Roman sources as Vascōnes, but the original meaning of the name derived from a root eusk- in the non-Indo-European language that they still speak today, is completely obscure. By the Middle Ages the Basques had been displaced from most of Gascony by speakers of Gascon (a dialect of Occitan, related to French), who were proverbial for their boastfulness. In the 11th century Gascony united with Aquitaine and was thus held by England between 1154 and 1453.

variants.name: Gascon
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Manuel, Jaime, Mario, Miguel, Rafael, Ruben, Amado, Ana, Ana Maria, Angel, Caridad.  French Andre, Chantal, Jean-Guy, Jean-Philippe, Monique, Serge, Simonne.
French; Spanish (Gascón): habitational name for someone from the province of Gascony, Old French Gascogne (see Gascoigne ). This surname is also found in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William Gascoigne V was born about 1450, in Gawthorpe, Yorkshire, England, his father, Sir William Gascoigne IV, was 26 and his mother, Jane Neville, was 18. He married Margaret Percy about 1467, in Leconfield, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 7 daughters. He registered for military service in 1485. His occupation is listed as justice of the peace in Yorkshire West Riding, England, United Kingdom. He died on 12 March 1487, in Harewood, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 38, and was buried in Harewood, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William Gascoigne V est né environ 1450, à Gawthorpe, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Sir William Gascoigne IV, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Jane Neville, avait 18 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Percy environ 1467, à Leconfield, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 7 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1485. Sa profession de son indiquée est justice of the peace à Yorkshire West Riding, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé le 12 mars 1487, à Harewood, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 38 ans, et a été enterré à Harewood, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir William Gascoigne V um 1450 in Gawthorpe, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir William Gascoigne IV 26 und seine Mutter Jane Neville 18. Er hat um 1467 in Leconfield, Yorkshire, England Margaret Percy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Er hat sich 1485 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. sein Beruf ist als justice of the peace in Yorkshire West Riding, England, United Kingdom aufgeführt. Er starb am 12. März 1487 im Alter von 38 Jahren in Harewood, Yorkshire, England und wurde in Harewood, Yorkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Gascoigne V è nato il circa 1450 nel Gawthorpe, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, Sir William Gascoigne IV, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Jane Neville, aveva 18 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Percy circa 1467, nel Leconfield, Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 7 figlie. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1485. La sua occupazione è indicata come justice of the peace nel Yorkshire West Riding, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Morì il 12 marzo 1487, nel Harewood, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 38 anni, e fu sepolto a Harewood, Yorkshire, England.

ja.Yorkshire, England: イギリスヨークシュアイア
ja.Gawthorpe, Yorkshire, England: イギリスヨークシュアイアガウソルペ
ja.Leconfield, Yorkshire, England: イギリスヨークシュアイアレコンフィールド
ja.Harewood, Yorkshire, England: イギリスヨークシュアイアハーエウッド
ja.lifeSummary: Sir William Gascoigne Vが約1450年にイギリスヨークシュアイアガウソルペで生まれた時，父Sir William Gascoigne IVは26歳，母Jane Nevilleは18歳であった。約1467年にイギリスヨークシュアイアレコンフィールドでMargaret Percyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼は1485年に兵役登録をした。イギリスイギリスヨークシュアイア ウエスト リディングでの職業はjustice of the peaceと記録されている。彼は1487年3月12日にイギリスヨークシュアイアハーエウッドで38歳で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアハーエウッドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William Gascoigne V(이)가 대략 1450년 영국 요르크실르 가w소에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William Gascoigne IV(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Jane Neville(은)는 18세였다. 그는 대략 1467년 영국 요르크실르 렉필드에서 Margaret Percy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1485년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그의 직업은 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 웨스트 리딩에서 justice of the peace이었다. 그는 1487년 3월 12일 영국 요르크실르 하레우드에서 38세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 하레우드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Gascoigne V nasceu aproximadamente 1450, em Gawthorpe, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir William Gascoigne IV, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Jane Neville, tinha 18 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Percy aproximadamente 1467, em Leconfield, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 7 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1485. Sua profissão aparece como justice of the peace em Yorkshire West Riding, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele faleceu em 12 de março de 1487, em Harewood, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 38 anos, e foi sepultado em Harewood, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William Gascoigne V родился около 1450 г. в местности гавтаурп, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir William Gascoigne IV было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Jane Neville, 18. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Percy около 1467 г. в местности леконфиелд, еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 7 дочерей. В 1485 году он поступил на военную службу. Работал по профессии justice of the peace в местности еркшир вест ридинг, Англия, Великобритания. Он умер 12 марта 1487 г. в местности харюуд, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 38 лет и был похоронен в местности харюуд, еркшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir William Gascoigne V nació aproximadamente 1450, en Gawthorpe, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir William Gascoigne IV, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Jane Neville, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Margaret Percy aproximadamente 1467, en Leconfield, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 7 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1485. Su ocupación registrada era justice of the peace en Yorkshire West Riding, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Murió el 12 de marzo de 1487, en Harewood, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 38 años, y fue sepultado en Harewood, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
